treatment_timeline.event: Patient evaluated in ED for left hand numbness and weakness.
Basic blood work and CT performed.
Increased Phenytoin dosage to 250 mg twice daily.

patient_outcome.final_status: Mental Status: Clear and coherent. Neurologic Status: Patient ambulates independently.
